name: elevo11--prompt-artist
description: Optimize and generate text-to-image prompts for AI art platforms. Use when a user wants to: (1) Optimize prompts for Midjourney, Nano Banana, Dreamina, Qwen image generation, (2) Translate simple descriptions into professional prompts, (3) Generate platform-specific prompt variations, (4) Add style/lighting/composition modifiers, (5) Create negative prompts. Supports Chinese/English input. Integrates SkillPay.me at 0.005 USDT/call.
